title: Red Sword
description: Change the diamond sword to make it look red
body:
Change the diamond sword to make it look red, like the images
![Red Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1254dd21b36de3322d03351422624cf1b81f8b0_0.webp)

this texture pack does not need optifine.

this texture pack is compatible with all versions from 1.21.6 to 1.15
